tests.description: Pooled held-out closest-approach KS: calibrated sim vs real (loco)
tests.note: small p => the calibrated sim's standoff distribution differs from real (the ~0.68 m fidelity gap is statistically real)
tests.controls_note: listed control arms SATURATE at the same statistic as calibrated despite different arrays => closest-approach KS does not discriminate repulsion strength (review C2: weak identifiability); these are controls, excluded from the multiplicity family. A de-saturated arm would instead appear as its own family test.
